# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

This is a personal learning space. I welcome respectful interaction from everyone
who engages with this repository, regardless of background or identity.

## Standards

Examples of behavior that contributes to a positive environment:

- Being respectful of differing viewpoints and experiences
- Giving and gracefully accepting constructive feedback
- Focusing on learning and growth

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- Trolling, insulting or derogatory comments
- Harassment of any kind
- Publishing others' private information

## Enforcement

Repository maintainers (AlessioBrillo) are responsible for clarifying and enforcing
these standards. Issues and comments that violate this code may be removed.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to all repository spaces (Issues, Discussions, etc.)
and public interactions about this project.
